items.title: Defining the heterogeneous molecular landscape of lung cancer cell responses to epigenetic inhibition
items.author: Devin K. Schweppe
items.content: Quantitative multi-omics profiling of HDAC inhibitor responses in non-isogenic cancer cell lines reveals shared and divergent molecular remodeling. Responses highlight cell-type-dependent and -independent epigenetic drug mechanisms of action.

items.title: Representational differentiation and integration within the hippocampal circuit during naturalistic stimuli
items.author: Xia Liang
items.content: Hippocampus encodes structured representations of movie semantic features, supported by representational differentiation in DG-CA3 and integration in CA3-CA1. CA1-retrosplenial connectivity mediates integration and individual cognitive performance.

items.title: Cryo-EM structure of bixafen-bound S. cerevisiae complex II unravels SDHI specificity against pathogenic fungi
items.author: Amandine Maréchal
items.content: Cryo-EM structures of yeast complex II in active and inhibitor-bound states reveal fungi-specific features governing enzyme stability and fungicide binding, paving the way for structure-guided design of improved inhibitors for agriculture and health.

items.title: Allergen-specific human IgE isolated through an allergen-agnostic pipeline—understanding immune response and allergen recognition
items.author: Mats Ohlin
items.content: Identification by single cell sequencing, NGS and specificity deconvolution and definition of allergen-specific human IgE from allergic subjects’ immune repertoire.

items.title: Reverse transcriptase inhibitors enable the generation of fertile spermatids from fetal mouse testes in vitro
items.author: Takuya Sato
items.content: Reverse transcriptase inhibitors combined with hypoxia enable complete in vitro spermatogenesis from E12.5 mouse fetal testes, producing functional spermatids and fertile offspring by suppressing retrotransposon activity during culture.

items.title: Genome sequence assembly of the 5S rDNA loci informs haplotype specificity and evolution in the greater duckweed Spirodela polyrhiza
items.author: Nikolai Borisjuk
items.content: A combination of extra-long DNA reads, conventional sequencing and chromosome in situ hybridization reveals the nucleotide level organization of ribosomal DNA loci encoding 5S rRNA in the genome of an aquatic plant, Spirodela polyrhiza.

items.title: Oseltamivir and baloxavir monotherapy and combination therapy efficacy against clade 2.3.4.4b A(H5N1) influenza virus infection in ferrets
items.author: Taronna R. Maines
items.content: Combination treatment with two antiviral drugs (oseltamivir and baloxavir) effectively limits clade 2.3.4.4b A(H5N1) influenza virus replication and disease severity in ferrets.

items.title: Characterization of mouse melanocytes reveals ultrastructural and immunological insights into the inner ear function
items.author: Haibo Wang
items.content: Electron microscopy and single-cell RNA sequencing analysis help distinguish melanocytes and macrophages in the inner ear, which are often misidentified.
